← The Practice

The Practice

Module 3 — Real databases & automation

Add a real database and a little automation so your tools start running quietly in the background — keeping track of things and handling the busywork without needing you.

120 minutes · live, small group

What we'll cover

  • Adding a real database — a proper home for your customers, orders, or notes
  • Light automation so routine steps happen on their own
  • Connecting the tools you built in Modules 1 and 2 into one workflow
  • Knowing what's safe to automate — and what to keep an eye on

What you'll walk out with

A connected tool that keeps track of your work and runs quietly in the background.

Know before you go

Built an assistant in Module 2 (or equivalent). A Claude Pro subscription is recommended.

See dates & book

Questions, answered

About this class

1

Who is Module 3 — Real databases & automation for?

Established women founders ready to take this further. It's part of The Practice, the hands-on AI track — no technical background needed.

2

Do I need any experience?

Built an assistant in Module 2 (or equivalent). A Claude Pro subscription is recommended.

3

What will I walk out with?

A connected tool that keeps track of your work and runs quietly in the background. Every Quinta & Co. class ends with something real you keep.

4

When can I take this class?

It's open now — 120 minutes · live, small group. Dates and booking are right on this page.

Quinta & Co.
